allow: Bash(node -e "const {pool} = require\('./src/config/database'\); pool.query\('DELETE FROM restaurants'\).then\(\(\) => {console.log\('✅ 餐厅数据已清空'\); process.exit\(0\);}\).catch\(err => {console.error\('❌ 清空失败:', err.message\); process.exit\(1\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "const {pool} = require\('./src/config/database'\); pool.query\('DELETE FROM attractions'\).then\(\(\) => {console.log\('✅ 景点数据已清空'\); process.exit\(0\);}\).catch\(err => {console.error\('❌ 清空失败:', err.message\); process.exit\(1\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "const {pool} = require\('./src/config/database'\); \(async \(\) => { const [dests] = await pool.query\('SELECT name, country FROM destinations LIMIT 10'\); console.log\('\\\\n📍 城市数据（前10条）:'\); dests.forEach\(d => console.log\('  -', d.name, '\(' + d.country + '\)'\)\); const [hotels] = await pool.query\('SELECT name, location FROM hotels LIMIT 10'\); console.log\('\\\\n🏨 酒店数据（前10条）:'\); hotels.forEach\(h => console.log\('  -', h.name, '-', h.location\)\); const [rests] = await pool.query\('SELECT name, address FROM restaurants LIMIT 10'\); console.log\('\\\\n🍽️  餐厅数据（前10条）:'\); rests.forEach\(r => console.log\('  -', r.name\)\); const [attrs] = await pool.query\('SELECT name, location_city, location_country FROM attractions WHERE location_country = \\"中国\\" LIMIT 10'\); console.log\('\\\\n🎯 国内景点（前10条）:'\); attrs.forEach\(a => console.log\('  -', a.name, '-', a.location_city\)\); process.exit\(0\); }\)\(\).catch\(err => {console.error\(err\); process.exit\(1\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "const {pool} = require\('./src/config/database'\); \(async \(\) => { const [result] = await pool.query\('SELECT id, name, country FROM destinations ORDER BY id'\); console.log\('\\\\n所有城市数据:'\); result.forEach\(d => console.log\('  ID:', d.id, '-', d.name, '\(' + d.country + '\)'\)\); process.exit\(0\); }\)\(\).catch\(err => {console.error\(err\); process.exit\(1\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "const {pool} = require\('./src/config/database'\); \(async \(\) => { await pool.query\('DELETE FROM destinations WHERE country != \\"中国\\"'\); console.log\('✅ 已删除国外城市'\); const [result] = await pool.query\('SELECT name, country FROM destinations ORDER BY id'\); console.log\('\\\\n📍 剩余城市:'\); result.forEach\(d => console.log\('  -', d.name, '\(' + d.country + '\)'\)\); process.exit\(0\); }\)\(\).catch\(err => {console.error\(err\); process.exit\(1\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "const {pool} = require\('./src/config/database'\); \(async \(\) => { const [before] = await pool.query\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) as count FROM attractions'\); console.log\('清理前景点总数:', before[0].count\); await pool.query\('DELETE FROM attractions WHERE location_country != \\"中国\\"'\); const [after] = await pool.query\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) as count FROM attractions'\); console.log\('✅ 已删除国外景点'\); console.log\('清理后景点总数:', after[0].count\); const [result] = await pool.query\('SELECT name, location_city FROM attractions ORDER BY id LIMIT 15'\); console.log\('\\\\n🎯 国内景点（前15条）:'\); result.forEach\(a => console.log\('  -', a.name, '-', a.location_city\)\); process.exit\(0\); }\)\(\).catch\(err => {console.error\(err\); process.exit\(1\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "const {pool} = require\('./src/config/database'\); \(async \(\) => { console.log\('\\\\n========== 数据库数据统计 ==========\\\\n'\); const [dests] = await pool.query\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) as count FROM destinations'\); console.log\('📍 城市总数:', dests[0].count\); const [destList] = await pool.query\('SELECT name FROM destinations ORDER BY id'\); console.log\('   城市列表:', destList.map\(d => d.name\).join\('、'\)\); const [hotels] = await pool.query\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) as count FROM hotels'\); console.log\('\\\\n🏨 酒店总数:', hotels[0].count\); const [hotelList] = await pool.query\('SELECT name FROM hotels LIMIT 5'\); console.log\('   示例:', hotelList.map\(h => h.name\).join\('、'\)\); const [rests] = await pool.query\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) as count FROM restaurants'\); console.log\('\\\\n🍽️  餐厅总数:', rests[0].count\); const [restList] = await pool.query\('SELECT name FROM restaurants LIMIT 5'\); console.log\('   示例:', restList.map\(r => r.name\).join\('、'\)\); const [attrs] = await pool.query\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) as count FROM attractions'\); console.log\('\\\\n🎯 景点总数:', attrs[0].count\); const [attrList] = await pool.query\('SELECT name FROM attractions LIMIT 5'\); console.log\('   示例:', attrList.map\(a => a.name\).join\('、'\)\); console.log\('\\\\n========== 数据导入完成 ==========\\\\n'\); process.exit\(0\); }\)\(\).catch\(err => {console.error\(err\); process.exit\(1\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "const { pool } = require\('./src/config/database'\); pool.query\('SELECT id, name, rating, review_count, price FROM attractions LIMIT 5'\).then\(\([rows]\) => { console.log\('景点数据:', JSON.stringify\(rows, null, 2\)\); pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(err => { console.error\('查询失败:', err.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const mysql = require\('mysql2/promise'\); require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); \(async \(\) => { const conn = await mysql.createConnection\({ host: process.env.DB_HOST || 'localhost', user: process.env.DB_USER || 'root', password: process.env.DB_PASSWORD || '', database: process.env.DB_NAME || 'tripadvisor' }\); const [rows] = await conn.query\('DESCRIBE hotels'\); console.log\('Hotels表结构:'\); rows.forEach\(row => console.log\(\\`  \\${row.Field} - \\${row.Type} - \\${row.Null} - \\${row.Key} - \\${row.Default}\\`\)\); await conn.end\(\); }\)\(\)")

Bash(node -e "const mysql = require\('mysql2/promise'\); require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); \(async \(\) => { const conn = await mysql.createConnection\({ host: process.env.DB_HOST || 'localhost', user: process.env.DB_USER || 'root', password: process.env.DB_PASSWORD || '', database: process.env.DB_NAME || 'tripadvisor' }\); const [rows] = await conn.query\(\\"SELECT id, name, location, rating, review_count FROM hotels WHERE location LIKE '%长沙%' LIMIT 5\\"\); console.log\('长沙酒店数据（前5条）:'\); rows.forEach\(hotel => console.log\(\\`  ID: \\${hotel.id}, 名称: \\${hotel.name}, 位置: \\${hotel.location}, 评分: \\${hotel.rating}, 评论数: \\${hotel.review_count}\\`\)\); await conn.end\(\); }\)\(\)")

Bash(node -e "const mysql = require\('mysql2/promise'\); require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); \(async \(\) => { const conn = await mysql.createConnection\({ host: process.env.DB_HOST || 'localhost', user: process.env.DB_USER || 'root', password: process.env.DB_PASSWORD || '', database: process.env.DB_NAME || 'tripadvisor' }\); const [rows] = await conn.query\(\\"SELECT id, name FROM destinations WHERE name LIKE '%长沙%'\\"\); console.log\('长沙目的地信息:'\); rows.forEach\(dest => console.log\(\\`  ID: \\${dest.id}, 名称: \\${dest.name}\\`\)\); await conn.end\(\); }\)\(\)")

Bash(node -e "const data = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0, 'utf-8'\)\); console.log\('API返回结果:'\); console.log\('状态:', data.success ? '成功' : '失败'\); console.log\('酒店数量:', data.hotels ? data.hotels.length : 0\); if \(data.hotels && data.hotels.length > 0\) { console.log\('\\\\n前3家酒店:'\); data.hotels.slice\(0, 3\).forEach\(\(h, i\) => console.log\(\\`  \\${i+1}. \\${h.name} - 评分: \\${h.rating}\\`\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const mysql = require\('mysql2/promise'\); require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); \(async \(\) => { const conn = await mysql.createConnection\({ host: process.env.DB_HOST || 'localhost', user: process.env.DB_USER || 'root', password: process.env.DB_PASSWORD || '', database: process.env.DB_NAME || 'tripadvisor' }\); console.log\('测试查询: location LIKE \\"%长沙%\\"'\); const [rows] = await conn.query\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) as count FROM hotels WHERE location LIKE ?', ['%长沙%']\); console.log\('结果数量:', rows[0].count\); const [sample] = await conn.query\('SELECT id, name, location FROM hotels WHERE location LIKE ? LIMIT 3', ['%长沙%']\); console.log\('\\\\n示例数据:'\); sample.forEach\(h => console.log\(\\`  \\${h.id}. \\${h.name} - location: \\${h.location}\\`\)\); await conn.end\(\); }\)\(\)")

Bash(node -e "const mysql = require\('mysql2/promise'\); require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); \(async \(\) => { const conn = await mysql.createConnection\({ host: process.env.DB_HOST || 'localhost', user: process.env.DB_USER || 'root', password: process.env.DB_PASSWORD || '', database: process.env.DB_NAME || 'tripadvisor' }\); const [rows] = await conn.query\('SELECT id, name, latitude, longitude FROM hotels WHERE id = 98'\); console.log\('酒店地理位置信息:'\); rows.forEach\(h => console.log\(\\`  ID: \\${h.id}, 名称: \\${h.name}\\n  纬度: \\${h.latitude}, 经度: \\${h.longitude}\\`\)\); await conn.end\(\); }\)\(\)")

Bash(node -e "const mysql = require\('mysql2/promise'\); require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); \(async \(\) => { const conn = await mysql.createConnection\({ host: process.env.DB_HOST || 'localhost', user: process.env.DB_USER || 'root', password: process.env.DB_PASSWORD || '', database: process.env.DB_NAME || 'tripadvisor' }\); const [rows] = await conn.query\('SELECT id, name, cover_image FROM destinations WHERE name = \\"长沙\\"'\); console.log\('长沙目的地数据:'\); rows.forEach\(d => console.log\(\\`  ID: \\${d.id}, 名称: \\${d.name}, 封面图片: \\${d.cover_image || \\"无\\"}\\`\)\); await conn.end\(\); }\)\(\)")

Bash(node -e "const data = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0, 'utf-8'\)\); console.log\('长沙数据:'\); const cs = data.data.find\(d => d.name === '长沙'\); if\(cs\) console.log\(JSON.stringify\(cs, null, 2\)\); else console.log\('未找到长沙'\);")

Bash(node -e "const mysql = require\('mysql2/promise'\); require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); \(async \(\) => { const conn = await mysql.createConnection\({ host: process.env.DB_HOST || 'localhost', user: process.env.DB_USER || 'root', password: process.env.DB_PASSWORD || '', database: process.env.DB_NAME || 'tripadvisor' }\); await conn.query\('UPDATE destinations SET cover_image = ? WHERE name = ?', ['/images/cities/changsha-new.jpg', '长沙']\); console.log\('✅ 已更新长沙的封面图片'\); const [rows] = await conn.query\('SELECT id, name, cover_image FROM destinations WHERE name = \\"长沙\\"'\); console.log\('更新后的数据:', rows[0]\); await conn.end\(\); }\)\(\)")
